name: 本·福尔梅拉

last_movies.title: 我的亿万富翁丈夫的双重生活

introduction: Ben Formella is a Los Angeles based actor, originally from Stevens Point, Wisconsin. He is currently obtaining his Bachelor's of Fine Arts in Acting from the California Institute of the Arts. Ben has immense training in acting on camera, for the stage, improvisation, musical theatre, and even clowning. He is represented by Stewart Talent, Eris Talent, and Management Montage.
